# Live-derived from local IB Gateway 127.0.0.1:4002.
# Scenario: executions_snapshot, server_version=200.
# Raw evidence kept local:
# /tmp/ibkr-go-issue-6-7-captures/20260412T183938Z-executions_snapshot
# events.jsonl sha256 prefix: ebfbbca30c20af97
#
# The live response to reqExecutions contained no ExecutionDataEnd (msg 55).
# This fixture keeps the connection open long enough for the caller's context
# deadline to be the only completion signal.
handshake {"server_version":200,"connection_time":"20260412 18:39:38 CET"}
server managed_accounts {"accounts":["DU12345"]}
server next_valid_id {"order_id":1001}
client req_executions {"req_id":"$req1","account":"","symbol":""}
sleep 200ms
disconnect
